<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-521" location="lines:521-527" -->
```bash
   PROVIDER_ADMIN_TOKEN=$(curl -fsS "http://keycloak.localhost:8082/realms/AppProvider/protocol/openid-connect/token" \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
     -d 'client_id=app-provider-validator' \
     -d 'client_secret=AL8648b9SfdTFImq7FV56Vd0KHifHBuC' \
     -d 'grant_type=client_credentials' \
     -d 'scope=openid' | jq -r .access_token)

```
